SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
CollectedFossil
Entity class representing a fossil collected by a user.
CollectedFossilDao
Data Access Object interface for CollectedFossil entity.
CollectedFossilRepository
Repository interface for managing collected fossil data.
CollectedFossilRepositoryImpl
Implementation of CollectedFossilRepository that delegates to the corresponding DAO for database operations.
DatabaseModule
Hilt module that provides database dependencies including the Room database instance and all DAO interfaces.
DigSiteCoord
Record representing a coordinate position on a dig site grid.
DigSiteFragment
 
DigSiteGrid
Entity class representing a dig site grid in the game.
DigSiteGridDao
Data Access Object interface for DigSiteGrid entity.
DigSiteGridRepository
 
DigSiteGridRepositoryImpl
 
DigSiteGridWithSquares
POJO (Plain Old Java Object) extending DigSiteGrid to include its associated squares.
DigSiteSquare
Entity class representing a single square within a dig site grid.
DigSiteSquareDao
Data Access Object interface for DigSiteSquare entity.
DigSiteSquareRepository
Repository interface for managing dig site square data.
DigSiteSquareRepositoryImpl
Implementation of DigSiteSquareRepository that delegates to the corresponding DAO for database operations.
DigSiteSquareState
Enumeration representing the possible states of a dig site square in the fossil sweeper game.
DigSiteView
Custom view for rendering the dig site game board.
Fossil
Entity class representing a fossil in the database.
FossilDao
Data Access Object interface for Fossil entity.
FossilGalleryFragment
!!! Work in progress !!! Fragment displaying a gallery of collected fossils.
FossilRepository
Repository interface for managing fossil reference data.
FossilRepositoryImpl
Implementation of FossilRepository that delegates to the corresponding DAO for database operations.
FossilSweeperApplication
Initializes (in the FossilSweeperApplication.onCreate() method) application-level resources that cannot be handled with Hilt dependency injection.
FossilSweeperDatabase
 
FossilSweeperDatabase.Converters
Type converters for Room database to handle non-primitive types.
FossilViewDialogFragment
Full-screen dialog fragment for displaying detailed information about a fossil.
GameplayViewModel
 
LoginFragment
Fragment for handling user authentication via Google Sign-In.
LoginViewModel
ViewModel for handling Google Sign-In authentication using GoogleAuthRepository.
LoginViewModel.AuthenticationState
 
MainActivity
Main activity for the Fossil Sweeper application.
MainFragment
Main menu fragment providing navigation to game play, fossil gallery, settings, and logout functionality.
NavGraphDirections
 
SettingsFragment
Fragment for displaying and managing application settings.
ToolType
Enumeration of available tools in the game.
UserProfile
Entity class representing a user profile.
UserProfileDao
Data Access Object interface for UserProfile entity.
UserProfileRepository
 
UserProfileRepositoryImpl
